manifest.name: HTML Page Viewer

name: HTML Page Viewer

releases.author: viggomeesters
releases.description: Fix Community review manifest validation by removing the redundant product name from manifest.json description.\n\nRelease assets: main.js, manifest.json, styles.css.

releases.author: viggomeesters
releases.description:
Initial public release.

Features:
- Open .html and .htm files in Obsidian.
- Rendered preview by default in a sandboxed iframe.
- Scripts are off by default and can be enabled per viewer tab with allow-scripts only.
- Source view with lightweight HTML syntax highlighting.
- Manual refresh and read-only behavior.

Release assets: main.js, manifest.json, styles.css.
